title: Assasination attempt on Donald Trump
bodyText:
Breaking News
                            Video

INTERNATIONAL NEWS - United States ex-president Donald Trump was shot at a rally in Pennsylvania on Saturday, 13 July.


> Trump is safe, but the suspected gunman was killed.


According to the New York Times, "The suspected gunman and one spectator were killed, and Trump was rushed off stage but is safe, officials said. The shooting is being investigated as an assassination attempt."

Facebook: Donald J Trump

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
